comment: Concordia Phase 8 — authored underwater POIs near Fall Kill Creek. Seeded by content-seeder.js#discoverSubWorlds (or manually via underwater.spawn_feature macro).

features.name: Fall Kill Kelp Forest
features.lore: Tall dark fronds sway with the current. Small fish dart between stems.

features.name: Sangree Coral Garden
features.lore: Vivid reds and oranges, descended from the fire-bloodline's gardens.

features.name: The Medici Crash
features.lore: Original Medici landing ship, half-buried. Eels nest in the wreckage.

features.name: Trench of the Forgotten
features.lore: Below 80m, light fails. Something with no name lives here.
